text.title: Inference Cost Unit Economics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the inference-cost-unit-economics methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-outcome-per-feature
step.action: Pick one success metric per feature (resolved ticket, accepted suggestion, completed purchase).

step.name: decompose-cost-per-call
step.action: Per call: tokens in × price + tokens out × price + retrieval ops + tool ops.

step.name: attribute-cost-to-outcome
step.action: Sum cost across calls per outcome (include retries, fallbacks).
step.decision-gate: If retries dominate cost, fix retry policy before optimising prompt.

step.name: publish-report-and-trigger-review
step.action: Write unit-economics-report.md; flag features with margin < target.
